pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 8 semantics, failing to utilize Java 11 features or enforce Java 11 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok version to a release compatible with Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions (like 1.16.18) may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 11 due to internal API changes in the JDK.
